text: I feel a deep sense of unease in this dimly lit, almost deserted space. The dark glass, stark lights, and the silence suggest either an after-hours office or a forgotten corridor of inquiry. The second scene hints at innovation and progress—R+D, a promise of future possibilities—yet plunged in shadow, the potential feels distant, almost stifled. Here, isolation and anticipation intermingle, filling me with both curiosity and a low hum of apprehension.
